chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 1968 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.5628/2023 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.5629/2023 07.10.2025 Mr. Shahnawaz M. Sahito, advocate for the applicant alongwith Dr. Nasir Khan, Collector, Collectorate of Customs, Hyderabad Pursuant to the last order, learned Collector is present. He states that reference is not pressed hence may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Presence and assistance of the learned Collector is appreciated. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
